creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
On Wed, 30 Jun 1999, Richard Kiss wrote:

> sed 's/^X//' >./pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-./pkg/COMMENT'
> XSmall, compilable scripting language providing easy access to C code.
> END-of-./pkg/COMMENT

<hoek nit=commentstyle>

There aren't periods at the ends of pkg/COMMENT

</hoek>
